title: Rostov-on-Don, Rostov Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Rostov-on-Don, Rostov Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Rostov-on-Don is a city in Rostov Oblast with a population of 1,130,000. The capital of Southern Russia, a bustling port city on the Don River with a rich Cossack heritage and vibrant cultural life.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
